title: Principal® Survey Shows Retirement Goal “Reset” for Many U.S. Workers Amid Recent Market Volatility and Inflation
text: DES MOINES, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Principal survey finds American workers are replacing dreams of a lavish retirement with simpler goals of maintaining the current standard of living.

title: Principal Financial Group® Names Natalie Lamarque as New General Counsel
text: DES MOINES, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Principal Financial Group announced Natalie Lamarque will join the company as its new general counsel effective August 1.

title: Reasons Why Investors Should Retain Principal Financial (PFG)
text: Principal Financial (PFG) benefits from higher annuity sales in Chile, financial flexibility and effective capital deployment.
